creator: rainbow@sanitylinux.org
text:
sysutils/vzvol was updated to version 0.7.0 upstream.
This update now includes a manpage, and upstream has remedied the incorrect location of vzvol. Previously it would be stored in PREFIX/bin, but as a system utility, it belonged in PREFIX/sbin.
That's my bad (upstream/maintainer)

I opened a diff at https://reviews.freebsd.org/D15707 to apply this update to ports/HEAD

(If I've screwed up the manpage install, or need to add anything to make sure the old PREFIX/bin/vzvol gets removed in favor of PREFIX/sbin/vzvol, let me know! I'm still kind of new at this whole maintainer thing.)
